interventions.name: D1 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: guided action-and-outcome routines that name one interface action and one resulting change explicitly

interventions.name: D1 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: icon and control matching tasks that connect common interface elements to functions

interventions.name: D1 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: before-and-after screen comparisons that force explicit input-output talk

interventions.name: D1 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired practice across two simple device or app contexts with the same action logic
